hero.subtitle: Multi-agent collaborative review: format, logic, and references in parallel. Mentor-level pre-review report in under 5 minutes.
hero.typedText: Research on Image Recognition Based on Deep Learning

features.title: Not just checking,
features.subtitle: Six dimensions of review, covering every detail from format to content for Chinese theses

multiAgent.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration
multiAgent.desc: Format, logic, and reference agents run in parallel. Each agent focuses on one domain for deeper results.

chat.title: Conversational AI Guide
chat.desc: Gemini Deep Research-style chat. AI asks questions, understands intent, and configures the best review strategy for your thesis type.

visual.title: Visual Review Process
visual.desc: Real-time display of AI reading and thinking. Typewriter streaming, progress cards—waiting becomes enjoyable.

format.title: Deep Format Check
format.desc: Strict GB/T 7714-2015 compliance. Chapter numbering, figure/table index consistency, page alignment.

logic.title: Logic Chain Analysis
logic.desc: Paragraph-level annotations and logic gap detection. Abstract four elements, conclusion-intro coherence, argument flaws.

english.title: English Abstract Polish
english.desc: Remove Chinglish, replace with academic vocabulary. Before/after comparison for better expression.

howItWorks.title: Four steps to
howItWorks.subtitle: From upload to report, fully automated—no tedious forms

upload.title: Upload Thesis
upload.desc: Drag & drop PDF. AI scans the first page and identifies field and degree type.

chat.title: Conversational Config
chat.desc: AI asks about your degree type and focus areas—like chatting with your advisor.

parallel.title: Multi-Agent Parallel
parallel.desc: Three AI agents work simultaneously. Real-time progress for each agent.

report.title: Get Detailed Report
report.desc: Five-dimension results in tabs. One-click PDF or Markdown download.

preview.title: Review Report · Deep Learning Image Recognition

pricing.title: Transparent pricing,
pricing.subtitle: Prepaid credits, no monthly fee, no subscription. Buy and use, credits never expire.

standard.name: Standard Bundle
standard.desc: Most popular for graduation season iterations

faq.title: You might ask
faq.subtitle: Questions? You may find answers here

items.a: MVP focuses on Chinese university theses (bachelor/master/PhD), PDF upload up to 150 pages. English theses and journal papers coming later.
Purchased credits never expire. Buy anytime, use anytime.
All uploads are encrypted. HTTPS in transit. PII is auto-masked in logs. Content is never used for training or sharing.
Auto-retry (3x exponential backoff). If still failing, task goes to manual review with ETA. Credits are not deducted until a report is delivered.
Yes. PDF (formatted) and Markdown (structured) for editing in Word or Notion.
WeChat Pay and Alipay (via Zpay). Stripe/PayPal planned.

ctaBanner.title2: let AI check your thesis first
ctaBanner.subtitle: Free first review on signup. No credit card. Start in 60 seconds.

footer.slogan: AI-powered thesis review. Multi-agent collaboration, mentor-level pre-review. Find and fix issues before defense.

testimonials.name: Wang
testimonials.text: ThesisAI found Chinglish and reference format issues in my abstract. Saved me a lot of time!

testimonials.name: Chen
testimonials.text: Logic analysis is strong—found a gap in my argument chain I missed. Very reassuring before defense.

testimonials.name: Li
testimonials.text: Love the conversational UX. AI asks what you care about after upload. Report is very detailed!

dashboard.settingsSubtitle: Manage your avatar, display name and other profile information

review.historyEmpty: No sessions yet—completed reviews will appear here
review.chatWelcomeAfterUpload: Welcome to ThesisAI — I’ve received your thesis for this review session. Below are your paper and domain; then you’ll see the review plan.
review.chatPlanIntro: Your review plan is ready — adjust if needed, then hit Start.
review.chatPlanRunningIntro: Review started — this is the plan we’re running.
review.planRunningFooter: Open the Progress tab for live stage updates.
review.domainEditHint: Editing domain will regenerate the static review plan
review.progressSubtitle: Stages update live from the server
review.reportPlaceholder: When the run finishes, this tab shows structured findings and suggestions.
review.reportEmptySection: No data for this section yet

errors.INVALID_STATUS: Cannot start review in this state
errors.PAGE_COUNT_OUT_OF_RANGE: Page count out of allowed range
errors.PAGE_COUNT_REQUIRED: Valid page count is required—please re-select the file and try again
errors.PAGE_COUNT_INVALID: Invalid page count or exceeds the allowed maximum
errors.PAGE_COUNT_PARSE: Could not read this PDF’s page count—try another file or try again later
errors.TRIGGER_NOT_CONFIGURED: Background jobs aren’t configured—credits were refunded. Try again later or contact support.
errors.TRIGGER_DISPATCH_FAILED: Could not start the background job—credits were refunded. Please try again.
errors.ROLLBACK_FAILED: Refund step failed—don’t retry repeatedly; contact support.
errors.RUN_ALREADY_ATTACHED: A run already exists for this review.
errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong, try again later

review.uploadDragLabel: Drag & drop or click to select PDF
